# Craft Your Message
> Turn your words into an interactive experience. Create personalized, shareable message links with mini-games, animations, and reveals.

## Summary
Craft Your Message is a web application that lets users create interactive messages for any occasion — apologies, birthday wishes, love confessions, funny roasts, and friendship notes. Each message becomes a unique link with a mini-game or animation that the recipient plays through before seeing the final message.

## Pages
- Home: https://craftyourmessage.com/ — Create interactive messages with games and animations
- Templates: https://craftyourmessage.com/templates — Browse all message templates (51 available)
- Create: https://craftyourmessage.com/create — Start building an interactive message
- About: https://craftyourmessage.com/about — Learn about the platform
- FAQ: https://craftyourmessage.com/faq — Frequently asked questions
- Contact: https://craftyourmessage.com/contact — Get in touch
- Privacy: https://craftyourmessage.com/privacy — Privacy policy
- Terms: https://craftyourmessage.com/terms — Terms of service

## Categories
- Love & Crush: https://craftyourmessage.com/category/love-crush
- Apology & Fight Repair: https://craftyourmessage.com/category/apology-fight-repair
- Friendship & Best Friend: https://craftyourmessage.com/category/friendship-best-friend
- Birthday & Special Days: https://craftyourmessage.com/category/birthday-special-days
- Funny & Roast: https://craftyourmessage.com/category/funny-roast

## Use Cases
- Send an apology: https://craftyourmessage.com/use-cases/send-apology
- Birthday wishes: https://craftyourmessage.com/use-cases/birthday-wishes
- Love confession: https://craftyourmessage.com/use-cases/love-confession
- Funny roast: https://craftyourmessage.com/use-cases/funny-roast
- Friendship message: https://craftyourmessage.com/use-cases/friendship-message

## Features
- 51+ interactive templates with unique game mechanics
- No account or sign-up required
- Works on all devices (mobile-first)
- Share via WhatsApp, Instagram, or any messaging app
- Customizable themes, tones, and colors
- Private, unguessable links
- Free to use
